RIORITY MARKETING
The Success That Built Our Empire

Marketing DNA Driving Everything We Do

Previously trusted by Malaysia's biggest brands, RIORITY MARKETING SDN BHD is the foundation upon which RIORITY GROUP was built.

Launched in 2020 by a team with 10+ years of marketing expertise, we quickly established ourselves as a digital marketing powerhouse. Our success in delivering results for over 500+ clients created the revenue and vision to expand into a diversified investment group.

This is who we are. This is what we do best. Marketing excellence isn't just a service we offer — it's our DNA, our legacy, and the engine behind everything RIORITY GROUP achieves.

Who We Are
A Group Built on
Vision & Integrity

RIORITY GROUP (M) SDN BHD is a Malaysian investment holding company built on the proven success of RIORITY MARKETING — our flagship marketing division established in 2020.

From our origins creating world-class marketing campaigns to becoming a diversified investment group in 2022, we continue to pursue one mission — building trusted businesses with long-term value. Marketing DNA drives everything we do.

Our Foundation
Vision & Mission
🔭 Our Vision

To be Asia's Most Trusted Investment Group

We envision a future where RIORITY GROUP stands as the benchmark for diversified investment excellence across Asia — a group synonymous with integrity, innovation and the relentless pursuit of world-class outcomes for our partners, investors and the communities we serve.

🎯 Our Mission

Building Legacies Through Bold Investment

Our mission is to identify exceptional business opportunities, invest with purpose and discipline, and grow each venture into a category leader. We exist to empower entrepreneurs, deliver returns for investors, and create lasting economic value — guided by honesty, excellence and a commitment to long-term growth.

Integrity Honesty in every decision, partnership and commitment
Excellence World-class standards in every business we build
Innovation Always ahead — from branding to AI-powered intelligence
Growth Expanding boldly across industries and borders
Our Portfolio
Business Divisions

Led by our flagship RIORITY MARKETING division — the success story that built our empire in 2020. Our marketing prowess with 10+ years of team expertise and 500+ clients served created the foundation to expand into five premium business sectors. Marketing DNA drives everything we do.

★

RIORITY MARKETING

Our Flagship & Foundation. Established 2020 with 10+ years team expertise. Social Media, Advertising & Video Marketing. Previously trusted by Malaysia's biggest brands. 500+ clients served — the success that built RIORITY GROUP.

Our Powerhouse →
02

Riority Logistics

A robust fulfillment network spanning Peninsular Malaysia, Guangzhou and Yi Wu. Professional customs clearance brokerage for seamless cross-border importation and exportation.

Est. 2025 · Cross-Border
03

Anytime Fitness

Proud franchise partner of the world-renowned Anytime Fitness brand. Two premium 24/7 gym locations in the Klang Valley, offering world-class fitness access to members.

2 Branches · Open 24/7
04

Porsche Specialist

A premier automotive investment — a dedicated specialist centre for Porsche repair and performance modification. World-class expertise serving Malaysia's most discerning enthusiasts.

porschespecialist.com
05

LilyBrain AI

Proprietary AI technology for natural language conversations and voice calls, deployed on Telegram and WhatsApp. Riority leads the intelligent transformation of business operations.

lilybrain.fit · Live
06

Design & Creative

Our founding business, established in 2014. Graphic design, branding, banners, flyers and printing — the creative foundation that ignited the RIORITY GROUP story.

Since 2014 · Our Origin

AI Innovation
Meet LilyBrain

RIORITY GROUP is not just investing in today's businesses — we are engineering tomorrow's intelligence. LilyBrain is our proprietary AI platform: a full-stack intelligent system capable of natural language conversation and real-time voice call interaction.

Deployed natively on Telegram and WhatsApp, LilyBrain removes friction from business communication, automates customer engagement, and scales intelligent interactions across any operation — 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

× Corporate Profile

RIORITY GROUP (M) SDN BHD

RIORITY GROUP (M) SDN BHD is a Malaysian investment holding company dedicated to building, investing in, and growing high-potential businesses across strategic industries. We operate with a long-term vision — identifying opportunities, partnering with capable operators, and developing businesses that create sustainable value.

Founded on the principles of trust, innovation, and strategic growth, RIORITY GROUP serves as a platform where entrepreneurs, partners, and investors come together to build impactful ventures.

Our investment portfolio spans several sectors including automotive, fitness, and artificial intelligence technologies. The Group has invested in automotive ventures, is involved in the fitness industry including Anytime Fitness, and is actively developing proprietary AI solutions designed to support modern businesses in an increasingly digital world.

As an investment-driven organization, we continuously explore new opportunities across emerging industries. Our objective is not simply to invest, but to build businesses with strong foundations, scalable models, and long-term market relevance.

RIORITY GROUP remains committed to expanding its portfolio while maintaining the trust and integrity that define our brand.

× Our Flagship Division

RIORITY MARKETING SDN BHD

RIORITY MARKETING SDN BHD is the foundation and flagship division of RIORITY GROUP — the success story that built our empire.

Established in 2020 by a team with 10+ years of marketing expertise, we quickly became a digital marketing powerhouse. Our proven track record with Malaysia's biggest brands and success in serving 500+ clients generated the revenue and vision that enabled RIORITY GROUP's expansion into a diversified investment holding company.

This is who we are. Marketing isn't just what we do — it's our DNA, our legacy, and the engine that drives everything RIORITY GROUP achieves.

Our Services:

📱 Social Media Marketing — Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube
📢 Advertising Campaigns — Digital ads that drive real results
🎥 Video Marketing — Professional content that engages and converts

Our Track Record:

✓ 500+ clients served
✓ 10+ years team expertise
✓ Previously trusted by PETRONAS, PTPTN, Miss Universal & more
✓ 100% digital focus — always ahead of the curve
